final_answer:
The finding is: full `go test ./... -count=1` fails in `app` because `MsgValidatorJoin` test literals still use removed fields (`TxHash`, `LogIndex`, `BlockNumber`, `Nonce`) in [abci_test.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/app/abci_test.go:3588) and [abci_test.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/app/abci_test.go:4366).

Why this matters: Phase 5 `x/stake` + `bridge` gates passed, but full pre-merge gate is still partial until `app` compiles/tests cleanly with the new native `MsgValidatorJoin` schema.

What should be done next:
1. Remove those legacy fields from the two `MsgValidatorJoin` literals in `app/abci_test.go`.
2. Run `go test ./app -count=1`.
3. Run `go test ./... -count=1` again and only call full completion if it passes.
